chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ يَغْتَسِلَانِ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ ثُمَّ يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا شَيْ‏ءٌ بَعْدَ الْغُسْلِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – The man and the woman both wash from the sexual impurity, then something comes out from them after the washing

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/147)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/147)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يُجْنِبُ ثُمَّ يَغْتَسِلُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَبُولَ فَيَجِدُ بَلَلًا بَعْدَ مَا يَغْتَسِلُ قَالَ يُعِيدُ الْغُسْلَ وَ إِنْ كَانَ بَالَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَغْتَسِلَ فَلَا يُعِيدُ غُسْلَهُ وَ لَكِنْ يَتَوَضَّأُ وَ يَسْتَنْجِي .

en.hubeali: Abu Dawood, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from his brother Al Hassan, from Zur’at, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked himasws about the man who comes to be with a sexual impurity, then he washes before he urinates, so he finds wetness after having washed’. Heasws said: ‘He would repeat the washing; and if he had urinated before he washed, so he would not repeat his washing, but he would perform Ablution (Wudhu), and he would clean his private part’.
en.sarwar: 4. Abu Dawud has narrated from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from his brother, al-Hassan from Zur’ah from Sama‘ah who has said the following: “I once asked the Imam about a man who experiences sexual relation; then takes Ghusl (bath) before urinating and finds wet spots after Ghusl (bath). He (the Imam) said, ‘He must take Ghusl (bath) again. Had he urinated before Ghusl (bath), he did not have to take Ghusl (bath) again; but he must take Wudu’ and cleanse himself properly.’”
